steps.name: Before Hooks
beforeEach hook
Fixture "context"
Create context
Fixture "page"
Create page
Navigate to "v2/"
Expect "toHaveURL"
Open Quote Menu
Click locator('//a[normalize-space()=\'Quote\']')
Navigate to Repairer Quotes
Click locator('#main-nav-menu').getByText('Repairer Quote', { exact: true })
Search and open Quote No: 10298
Fill "10298" locator('input[placeholder="Search..."]')
Expect "toHaveValue" locator('input[placeholder="Search..."]')
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Filter' })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table:visible tbody tr td:first-child a[href]').filter({ hasText: /^\s*10298\s*$/ })
Wait for navigation
Click locator('table:visible tbody tr td:first-child a[href]').filter({ hasText: /^\s*10298\s*$/ })
Click Quoting tab
Click getByRole('link', { name: 'edit_document Quoting' })
Reload
Click Quoting tab
Click getByRole('link', { name: 'edit_document Quoting' })
Verify quote part rows order matches the sequence
Scroll into view locator('.quote-items-section.parts')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.quote-items-section.parts').locator('.item-row-quote-builder-parts:not(.is-hidden)').first()
Query count locator('.quote-items-section.parts').locator('.item-row-quote-builder-parts:not(.is-hidden)')
Verify part sequence matches add order
Row 1 should be "FRT BUMPER BAR"
